Vendor.description: A vendor/supplier from whom the organization purchases goods or services.

outstanding_balance.name: outstanding_balance

computed.formula: See domain_rules for outstanding_balance computation logic

outstanding_balance.computed_from: SUM(bills.balance_due WHERE vendor_id=id AND status NOT IN ['void','paid'])

ytd_payments.name: ytd_payments

computed.formula: See domain_rules for ytd_payments computation logic

ytd_payments.computed_from: SUM(vendor_payments.amount WHERE vendor_id=id AND payment_date >= start_of_year AND status='completed')

Bill.description: A bill received from a vendor representing an obligation to pay.

computed.formula: See domain_rules for tax_total computation logic
See domain_rules for total computation logic

BillLine.description: A single line item on a bill.

VendorPayment.description: A payment made to a vendor against one or more bills.

PaymentBatch.description: A bulk payment run grouping multiple vendor payments.

computed.formula: See domain_rules for payment_count computation logic

PaymentBatchItem.description: An individual item within a payment batch linking a vendor and bill.

state.billFormStore_description: Stores draft bill with lines during creation/editing
state.batchPaymentStore_description: Stores selected bills for batch payment run

websocket_events.description: Emitted when a bill is approved
Emitted when a payment batch is fully processed

journal_entry_side_effects: on approve: DR Expense / CR Accounts Payable
on payment: DR Accounts Payable / CR Bank

steps: For each item: create VendorPayment, update bill.amount_paid

computed_fields.formula: SUM(bills.balance_due WHERE vendor_id=id AND status NOT IN ['void','paid'])
SUM(vendor_payments.amount WHERE vendor_id=id AND payment_date >= start_of_year AND status='completed')

domain_rules.ui_behavior: Disable payment submit if amount exceeds balance_due
Hide payment action for voided bills

domain_rules.rule: Approved bills are read-only except for payment recording
domain_rules.api_guard: Return 422 for field edits on approved bills except amount_paid
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Disable form fields for approved bills; show payment panel only

domain_rules.rule: Payment batch cannot be processed without approval
domain_rules.api_guard: Return 422 if batch.status != approved when calling /process
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Process button hidden until batch is approved

domain_rules.rule: Bill overdue auto-set when due_date < today AND status IN [received, approved, partial]
domain_rules.api_guard: Background job runs daily to update status to overdue

domain_rules.ui_behavior: Show error if duplicate bill_number entered

deleted_at.notes: Soft delete — all queries filter deleted_at IS NULL

org_id_injection.middleware: req.body.org_id is stripped; injected from req.user.org_id

conflict_response.message: Record was modified by another user. Refresh and retry.

concurrency.high_contention_tables: see entities with high write concurrency

audit_trail.triggers: application-level (before write hook) — never DB trigger to avoid log bloat

standard_constraints.name: chk_{table}_deleted_order
standard_constraints.expression: deleted_at IS NULL OR deleted_at >= created_at

db_constraints_policy.enum_validation: DB ENUM types preferred over VARCHAR + CHECK; enum values defined in global enums registry

soft_delete_policy.filter: deleted_at IS NULL applied globally via query builder middleware
soft_delete_policy.cascade: Parent delete soft-deletes children via application cascade, not DB cascade
soft_delete_policy.hard_delete: Prohibited in production; available only via admin CLI with audit log
soft_delete_policy.restore: Set deleted_at = NULL; triggers audit log entry

naming_conventions.date_fields: Always use _at suffix for TIMESTAMPTZ, _date suffix for DATE
naming_conventions.id_fields: Primary key is always id; foreign keys are {entity}_id
